title: jussiaea natans var. genuina
intro: Jussiaea natans var. genuina, also known as Water Shield or Yellow Water Shield, is a floating aquatic plant native to North America and parts of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in saponins, which have been shown to have antioxidant and antimicrobial effects, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against infections. Jussiaea natans var. genuina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in folk medicine and natural remedies.
